## Checklist
- [ ] Tested on real or virtual hardware as relevant
- [ ] No secrets, credentials or personal data committed
- [ ] `.mypatch` / shell files keep LF line endings (per `.gitattributes`)
- [ ] Docs / changelog updated if user-facing
- [ ] I have read the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)
